messages: {"parts":[{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"# Reset D3.1 to running so the filter can process the new deposit\\npython3 -c \\\"\\nimport json\\nwith open('N5/builds/frontend-skill/meta.json') as f:\\n    meta = json.load(f)\\nmeta['drops']['D3.1']['status'] = 'running'\\nmeta.pop('gate', None)\\nwith open('N5/builds/frontend-skill/meta.json', 'w') as f:\\n    json.dump(meta, f, indent=2)\\nprint('Reset D3.1 to running')\\n\\\" && python3 Skills/pulse/scripts/pulse.py tick frontend-skill 2>&1\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01GSx7hJLormKxYSUvY2sRbN","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":84494,"cache_write_tokens":985,"cache_read_tokens":83508,"output_tokens":210,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":985,"cache_read_input_tokens":83508,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":210}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T21:25:58.152943Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01EWjj6c7VE1Cv4avhbKGZoR","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"e7fb7b3c-3b91-4e98-8306-057bea19beed","metadata":null}
